indications.text:
SITAVIG is a deoxynucleoside analogue of DNA polymerase inhibitor, To report SUSPECTED ADVERSE REACTIONS, contact EPI Health,
indicated for the treatment of recurrent herpes labialis (cold sores) in LLC. at 1-800-499-4468 or FDA at 1-800-FDA-1088 or
immunocompetent adults. (1). www.fda.gov/medwatch....
